data.name: 淫蕩美少女戰士中出性愛
data.detailed_description:
讓成熟豐滿的元美少女戰士和女幹部懷孕！
讓為了守護家庭和和平而再次成為美少女戰士戰鬥的人妻和女幹部成為雞雞的玩物！
和穿著和自身年齡不符的服裝的成熟豐滿的母狗做愛，給她射精，讓她懷孕！
在有著成熟人妻美少女戰士和女幹部的世界進行自由做愛！

■盡情享受成為妻子的美少女戰士和女幹部！
成熟的人妻，穿著和自身年齡不符的服裝進行戰鬥的美少女戰士以及身為敵對勢力的色情豐滿女幹部的肉體。 任由你的慾望，盡情享受這一切吧！
・為了補充你的精力，她們一個個露出小穴，祈求你的射精
・束縛住女幹部，進行打屁股的懲罰&中出做愛
・兩隻成熟母狗赤裸下跪
・保持著戰鬥後全身衣服破爛的狀態和老公說話，並同時操她
・踩在女幹部的巨乳上，並由其展開進行活塞運動
・要她和老公打電話的同時幫你打奶砲，口交
・騎在她身上用巨乳打奶炮
・把所有套套用完之後讓她和老公說話，並同時無套內入
・給被抓住的女幹部進行打屁股的懲罰
・讓本人裝扮成扮演美少女的變態，在戶外幹她
・主角長出出手，全力進攻女幹部的所有洞
・在沙灘上後入大屁股，進行活塞運動
・操爛張開雙腿對你宣誓忠誠的美少女戰士和女幹部
・向全世界展示你將美少女戰士和女幹部做成了自己的肉便器
・將女幹部當作母豬來飼養
・讓美少女戰士成為你的錢包和存放雞雞的盒子
・在殘黨面前束縛女幹部，將她當作玩物使用。 並以此讓殘黨知道雞雞的厲害
・懷孕後的色情舞蹈勸導別人成為諂媚雞雞的母狗戰士

■成熟母狗們的色情聲音！
認真人妻並且是元美少女戰士，高傲的女幹部，她們一個個成為你的玩物的淫亂色情聲音！ 請欣賞臣服於正義雞雞的女幹部和元美少女戰士的各種風騷十足的聲音！

data.short_description: 讓成熟豐滿的元美少女戰士和女幹部懷孕！ 讓為了守護家庭和和平而再次成為美少女戰士戰鬥的人妻和女幹部成為雞雞的玩物！
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 繁體中文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.11
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound

data.name: Wonder Waifu: Ero-Hero NTR
data.detailed_description:
Peaceful times can never last, it has been years since the Magical Girl, Pure Capella, defeated the evil Jewel Organization and both haven't been heard from since... Our protagonist, ever vigilant, doesn't take this peaceful era for granted though! He diligently trains in martial arts at a dojo so he can... ogle the hot wife of the instructor?? Can you blame him though? Yuumi is an absolute babe! If it isn't her enormous melons or absolutely juicy booty, her voice alone is enough to send shivers up our little hero's spine. Yuumi truly is a total package, just a shame she is married already...

One particular day after training at the dojo our protagonist is feeling especially energized as Yuumi herself paid an unexpected visit to the dojo, however his commute home is interrupted by the return of the sinister Jewel Organization and for some reason HE seems to be their target! After mistaking his assailant as some kind of pervert (based on the skimpy outfit she appears in) he is almost kidnapped before Pure Capella makes her triumphant return, looking like she hasn't lost a step over the years whisking our hero off to safety!

Things aren't as they seem, after rescuing the protagonist from Glacia's clutches Pure Capella's transformation breaks! If that wasn't shocking enough Pure Capella turns out to be Yuumi! She quickly dumps some exposition on protag-kun about the source of her powers, and her previous encounters with the Jewel Organization but importantly, what we are all here for, to recharge her energy to continue fighting against the evil organization she needs protag-kun's "energy" and they only way to get it is by having raw, unprotected, baby-making SEX!

The days following are spent fucking Yuumi as hard and as often as possible, so she can save the day of course! It's a happy coincidence that her limp-dicked husband can't step up to do the job and after you pump enough energizing loads into her maybe she'll forget all about him and become your exclusive meat onahole instead, obviously if the world is destroyed she can't receive her new master's lovin'!

Glaica ain't gonna let this slide, but is she ready to stand up to a well fucked and fully charged Pure Capella? Find out THIS TIME on Wonder Waifu: Ero-Hero NTR!

  • Translated version of the original Japanese Visual Novel
  • The Heroes and Villains are fully voiced with original Japanese dialogue
  • Original artwork HD upscaled with 16:9 and 4:3 variants
  • Hours of story content
  • Audio including music and special effects
  • Enhanced with character sprite animations
  • Gallery and Scene selections
  • Cuck the husband of Capella and steal the elite agent of an evil organization to... save the day?

Wonder Waifu: Ero-Hero NTR Is the English localization of a Visual Novel originally created by prolific Japanese developer Miel. We at Cherry Kiss aim to provide an authentic Japanese Visual Novel experience to gamers outside of Japan.

**PLEASE NOTE**
All characters described and visually represented in this game are over 18 years of age, and no actual, nor identifiable minor was used in the production of this game.

data.short_description: Pure Capella and the naughty Jewel Organization locked in a stalemate need the power of pure love to tip the scales in each other's favor, however pure LUST will have to do!
data.supported_languages:
English*, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese*, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese*
*languages with full audio support

Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • Processor: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX compatible

  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX-compatible sound

  • Processor: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Storage: 2 GB available space

linux_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:

  • Processor: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2.0
